name: NapCat QQ
description: QQ chat channel plugin for OpenClaw via NapCat (OneBot 11)
author: ProperSAMA

agentId.title: Fixed Agent ID
agentId.description: Optional: force all NapCat inbound sessions to use this OpenClaw agent ID

allowUsers.title: Allowed User IDs
allowUsers.description: Only accept messages from these QQ user IDs (empty = accept all)

groupWhitelist.title: Group Whitelist
groupWhitelist.description: Only accept messages from these QQ group IDs when non-empty

enableGroupMessages.title: Enable Group Messages
enableGroupMessages.description: When enabled, process group messages (requires mention to trigger)

streaming_mode.title: Streaming Mode
streaming_mode.description: Stream replies as incremental QQ messages instead of waiting for the final combined response

groupMentionOnly.title: Require Mention in Group
groupMentionOnly.description: In group chats, only respond when the bot is mentioned (@)

enablePrivateTypingStatus.title: Enable Private Typing Status
enablePrivateTypingStatus.description: Show QQ 'typing' status in private chats while OpenClaw is processing a reply

mediaProxyEnabled.title: Enable Media Proxy
mediaProxyEnabled.description: Expose /napcat/media endpoint so NapCat can fetch media from OpenClaw host

publicBaseUrl.title: OpenClaw Public Base URL
publicBaseUrl.description: Base URL reachable by NapCat device, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:18789

voiceBasePath.title: Voice Base Path
voiceBasePath.description: Base directory for relative audio files (e.g. /tmp/napcat-voice)

groupFileFolder.title: Group File Default Folder
groupFileFolder.description: Optional NapCat group file folder path used by /upload_group_file

groupFileHostPrefix.title: Group File Host Prefix
groupFileHostPrefix.description: Host path prefix that is mounted into NapCat container (e.g. /Users/me/shared)

groupFileContainerPrefix.title: Group File Container Prefix
groupFileContainerPrefix.description: Container path prefix matching host prefix (e.g. /app/shared)

groupFileStageHostDir.title: Group File Stage Host Dir
groupFileStageHostDir.description: Host directory (mounted into NapCat container) to stage files before upload

groupFileStageContainerDir.title: Group File Stage Container Dir
groupFileStageContainerDir.description: Container directory corresponding to stage host dir (e.g. /app/napcat/plugins/upload-staging)

enableInboundLogging.title: Enable Inbound Message Logging
enableInboundLogging.description: Log all received QQ/group messages before allowlist filtering

inboundLogDir.title: Inbound Log Directory
inboundLogDir.description: Directory to store per-user/per-group inbound logs

token.title: HTTP API Token
token.description: Token for authenticating with NapCat HTTP server (Bearer token)
